page: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server instance belonging to the Dadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. Utilizing the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 32 vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, running at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Storage is bundled with a local disk capacity of 1890 GB, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. No GPU accelerators are present on this virtual machine, which runs under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark evaluations indicate top-tier performance in single-core operations. The stress-ng single-core CPU test and single-threaded gzip compression both rank in the top 10% of tested systems. Multi-threaded decompression and PassMark CPU scores fall within the top 25%, demonstrating strong processing capabilities for extended instruction sets and cryptographic tasks. Memory bandwidth and multi-core stress-ng performance align with average mid-tier expectations. For specialized workloads, the server achieves top-tier text generation speeds on small language models, though performance scales down to average levels when handling medium-sized models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D32ads_v7 offers a balanced resource density, pairing a high-frequency AMD processor with substantial local storage and memory. This makes it a viable option for workloads requiring a blend of compute power and fast local disk access without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated instances. The hardware profile is well-suited for general-purpose applications, database hosting, static web serving, and lightweight machine learning inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server from the Dadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 32 vCPUs across 16 physical cores, 128.0 GB of RAM, and a 1890 GB local disk with Premium Storage support. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance lacks a GPU but delivers top-tier single-core performance, as evidenced by stress-ng and single-threaded compression benchmarks. Multi-threaded processing and cryptographic operations rank in the top 25%, while memory bandwidth and database operations remain in the average tier. The balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-capacity local storage make this instance highly cost-efficient for general-purpose workloads, static web serving, database operations, and small-scale language model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server featuring 32 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC processor for strong single-core and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ads_v7 is a general-purpose server with 32 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by a 4.5 GHz AMD EPYC CPU.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose server featuring high-frequency AMD processors, substantial local storage, and strong single-core performance for diverse workloads.

Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
